bdtree:item-handbooktext-boat-sailed-*:
Sailboats are constructed in place on land, and then rolled into the water. They cannot be picked up. They can be deconstructed by holding down rightmouse with a saw. See the Building A Sailboat entry for more information.

Movement
Once you have constructed your sailboat, rightmouse click on the starboard aft seat (by the tiller at the stern) to sit in that seat: only that seat can control the boat. With the sails furled, you can use normal navigation keys to move the boat slowly. rightmouse-click on the cleat on the side of the mast (where a rope is tied) to unfurl the sail and pick up speed. The sailboat currently does not respond to wind direction, only your movement keys.

If the boat becomes grounded or in water that is too shallow, it can be moved very slowly using the arrow keys, but only with the sail furled again.

Equipping
Most boat accessories are added to the boat via ctrl + rightmouse.
The boat can also hold several passengers - in every boat, one passenger can sit on the port-side aft seat (adjacent to the player who is at the tiller controlling the boat). Additional seats can be added to any of the eight cargo hold spots.

You can place containers (including chests, baskets, and storage vessels) in the hold of the boat, and access them on or off the boat.

You can also place a mount (such as an elk) on the boat by first placing a wooden fence post in one of the cargo spots - being sure to leave 2 cargo spots empty aft of the post - and then using a rope on this fence post, which will place the animal into the aft cargo spots. You can then disembark the animal using rightmouse on the fence post.

You can attach a lantern to the aft face of the mast (about 3 meters up) to provide light.

Ratlines can be attached to the gunwhales on each side of the mast in order to allow you to climb to the top of the mast to look around.

An anchor can be placed in the front-left space in the prow (though currently the anchor has no function).

There is also a spot at the prow for a figurehead to be placed (you can also place your own chiseled figurehead there), and on the port bow, your boat can be named (using pigment and shift + rightmouse-click).
bdtree:item-handbooktext-boat-raft-*:
- Place the raft with a rightmouse click.
- rightmouse click on the raft to board it.
- With an oar in your active hotbar slot, you can move the raft.
- Disembark from the raft using the shift key.
- Pick up the raft using the shift button combined with a rightmouse click.
